channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Speed sign faded and leaning, 5th June
item.description:
Just north of The House In The Tree pub on Withybridge lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Withybridge Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Speed sign faded and rotated, 5th June
item.description:
Half way along withybridge lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Withybridge Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th June
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 700x300x55mm approx Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The brunches blocking the pavement, 5th June
item.description:
By the bus stop in ermin street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 slaps unstable on path that leads to drive, 5th June
item.description:
2 slaps on pavement are loose which lead to drives of 5 and 4 Arle close Have to drive over these to get into drives . They rock when you drive over them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Arle Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes at top end of road nearest Arle road, 5th June
item.description:
1 pothole on manhole cover at top of road near Arle road 2 potholes just a idt further down the road from the manhole on either side of the middle of carriageway 1 further pothole on side of road on right hand side w coming from Arle road before you get to first bungalow cars normally parked opposite so no alternative to going down it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Arle Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In numerous places, 5th June
item.description:
Good Morning, this is the ongoing problem of Salamanca Road Potholes that I have been complaining about since 5th December 2025, Thank you for coming up yesterday and filling in some of the potholes, but alas there are numerous potholes with lots of white paint around them that the Gentlemen did not fill in, why when they are right there did they leave them they are obviously going to be done as they have great white lines around them, I am really fed up with reporting these, please come and complete it all to save me keep on report it beyond me why they did some yesterday and left the rest bonkers. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Salamanca Road, Oakley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waitrose trolley dumped on Honeybourne Line, 5th June
item.description:
On the Honeybourne Line. Some clothes with it. What3words: ///logo.tile.tall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping!, 5th June
item.description:
Bag of commercial rubbish on side of road. Fly tipping is becoming a regular nuisance along this stretch of road. Previous report from last week has not been actioned for further up the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees are below 5.2 metres clearance over road carriageway and pushing down the phone lines, 5th June
item.description:
Ermin Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
